units.name: Cadian Command Squad
units.notes: See your Battleforce datasheet card and Imperial Faction Pack for exact stats.

abilities.name: Combined Arms Command
abilities.effect: Officers coordinate infantry, artillery, and armour — attach leaders during list building.

units.name: Commissar
units.notes: See your Battleforce datasheet card for exact stats.

abilities.name: Summary Execution
abilities.effect: Keeps the line steady under fire — a classic Guard morale anchor.

abilities.name: Infantry Core
abilities.effect: Flexible battleline troops to hold terrain footprints and screen for your tanks.

units.name: Field Ordnance Battery
units.notes: One Field Ordnance Battery — two weapon platforms.

abilities.name: Indirect Bombardment
abilities.effect: Long-range artillery that punishes exposed units — watch Indirect Fire rules.

abilities.name: Earthshaker Cannon
abilities.effect: Heavy artillery platform — ideal for clearing objectives before the infantry advance.

abilities.name: Armoured Spearhead
abilities.effect: The box centerpiece — pushes the line forward with heavy firepower and durability.
